install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y git wget unzip && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
pip install tiktoken numpy einops safetensors huggingface_hub transformers accelerate
CUDA_HOME=/usr/local/cuda TORCH_CUDA_ARCH_LIST='8.0;9.0' CXXFLAGS='-D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=0' pip install --no-build-isolation causal-conv1d==1.6.1
CUDA_HOME=/usr/local/cuda TORCH_CUDA_ARCH_LIST='8.0;9.0' CXXFLAGS='-D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=0' pip install --no-build-isolation --no-deps mamba-ssm==2.3.1
python -c "from causal_conv1d import causal_conv1d_fn; print('causal_conv1d OK')"

python -c "import ctypes, glob; path=glob.glob('/opt/conda/lib/python*/site-packages/nvidia/nccl/lib/libnccl.so.2')[0]; v=ctypes.c_int(); ctypes.CDLL(path).ncclGetVersion(ctypes.byref(v)); assert v.value == 22105, f'Expected NCCL 2.21.5 but got {v.value}'"
python -c "import triton; assert triton.__version__ == '3.2.0', f'Expected triton 3.2.0 but got {triton.__version__}'"
local_install_cmds: pip install tiktoken numpy einops safetensors huggingface_hub transformers accelerate
python -c "import ctypes; v=ctypes.c_int(); ctypes.CDLL('libnccl.so.2').ncclGetVersion(ctypes.byref(v)); assert v.value == 22105, f'Expected NCCL 2.21.5 but got {v.value}'"
python -c "import triton; assert triton.__version__ == '3.2.0', f'Expected triton 3.2.0 but got {triton.__version__}'"

data_deps.name: lm-eval-datasets
data_deps.description: Pre-downloaded HF datasets for lm-eval (hellaswag, arc, piqa, winogrande, ~200MB)
